name: Early-Bird Buttermilk Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Milk, as needed for thinning
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
2. Beat together the buttermilk, milk, beaten egg, and oil.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until well combined. A few small lumps are acceptable.
4. Test with a pancake; adjust the batter by thinning with milk (not buttermilk) if necessary for proper consistency.
5. Heat the pan and lightly coat it with oil. The heat should cause water to sizzle, not just sit.
6. Pour about 1/8 cup of batter into the hot pan.
7. When bubbles form on top and the bottom is golden, turn the pancake.
8. Cook until done on the second side.
